nodes.label: Electron Main Orchestrator
nodes.responsibility: Owns app lifecycle, sessions, windows, lazy services, progress broadcasts, and IPC registration.

nodes.label: Window And Browser Automation
nodes.responsibility: Creates app windows and manages TEMU seller, ads, login, session probe, browser storage, and popup automation.

nodes.label: IPC Registration
nodes.responsibility: Defines channel constants and registers renderer to main handlers by feature domain.

nodes.label: Preload Bridge
nodes.responsibility: Exposes the safe window.temuApp API surface used by renderer modules.

nodes.label: Renderer Shell And Apps
nodes.responsibility: Provides the main UI shell, Vue renderer bundles, catalog pages, and legacy renderer workbenches.

nodes.label: Catalog And Profile Metadata
nodes.responsibility: Defines feature and creation cards, module entries, action ids, code paths, and storage profiles.

nodes.label: Feature Services
nodes.responsibility: Implements operations, marketing, promotion, POD MiaoShou, category, upload, export, and shared feature workflows.

nodes.label: Creation Services
nodes.responsibility: Implements Jimeng settings, POD suite image generation, PSD smart object rendering, masks, templates, and slicing.

nodes.label: Shop Management
nodes.responsibility: Stores shop groups, shop records, visibility, fingerprint profiles, and browser workspace shop metadata.

nodes.label: Build And Validation Tooling
nodes.responsibility: Builds renderer bundles, validates catalog and IPC surfaces, checks pricing logic, and packages releases.

nodes.label: Persistence Scope
nodes.responsibility: Defines TEMU_Data_Electron root and account-scoped storage rules for config, state, and cache.

edges.description: Renderer modules call window.temuApp methods exposed by preload.
Preload methods invoke IPC channels defined and registered under src/ipc.
IPC registration is composed by src/main.js at app startup.
Main process constructs and passes feature services into IPC handlers.
Main process constructs creation services and routes creation IPC.
Main process creates app windows and shop browser automation controllers.
Several feature services use the shop window browser controller for TEMU session-backed workflows.
Profile services derive local and cloud storage paths from catalog storage keys and the app data root.
Validation scripts assert catalog shape, uniqueness, and code paths.
Validation scripts check preload methods against IPC channel constants and registrations.
